base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ice_tileset — a tile from 1988 super mario bros 2. Ice/Snow (World 4) — slippery-floor, icy-crystal pillars, frozen-POW. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
